Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1815 "CODENAMEMATII-1815" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Codename-Mat II.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 start the game, not just any key:
1. Patched the JSR $EEB3 instruction at $19C8 to be JSR $0810 instead 2. Added a small routine at $0810 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $C6 to $01 and returns, which causes the game to start just as if any key was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JMPs to $EEB3 to carry on the normal code flow.
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $19CD.
